select_conversation: Select a conversation from the list, or start a new one.
empty_conversation: Say hi — the assistant can read, edit, or summarise your files.
thinking_gerunds: Thinking | Pondering | Reasoning | Cogitating | Mulling | Percolating | Reflecting | Deliberating | Brewing | Noodling
delete_confirm_text: "{{title}}" will be removed from this provider's history.
auto_accept_help: Skip the confirmation dialog for edit / write / create / replace tool calls in this conversation. Read-class tools always auto-execute.
share_active_file_help: Attach the currently-open file to every send in this conversation. The agent sees the latest in-editor content.
share_selection_help: Attach the current editor selection (with line range) to every send. Off by default to avoid accidentally over-sharing.
